'''Maryo''' was a resort [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. It was well known for its bazaars and was often visited by idle wealthy beings. Those who visited the planet also enjoyed hunting the native [[peckva]]s and fishing for [[colossus fish]] amongst the world's vast seas.

It was visited by [[Dixon Dadeferron|Dixon]], [[Torm Dadeferron|Torm]] and [[Trevim Dadeferron]] after the death of Torm and Trevim's mother. There, Torm was recruited by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] to [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on Dixon and Trevim.

[[N'zaet Nir]] also lived on Maryo.

==Behind the scenes==
Maryo was first mentioned in ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''. It was later included in an entry of the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', where it was spelled "'''Mayro'''." This spelling of the planet's name was continued in ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' and the short story "[[Omega Squad: Targets]]." The planet's name was once again spelled "Maryo" in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
